title: Wire uploaded Multani Mitti product images and remove physical address from contact UI

requirements.summary: Add uploaded 100gm/200gm pack photos as static assets and use them for the two product cards instead of generated placeholders.
acceptanceCriteria: The repository contains the uploaded images available as static assets under the frontend public directory (served directly by the frontend)
The 100gm product card in the Products section renders the uploaded “100gm Front.jpg” image (not the current /assets/generated/multani-mitti-100gm.dim_400x400.jpg)
The 200gm product card in the Products section renders the uploaded “200gm Front.jpg” image (not the current /assets/generated/multani-mitti-200gm.dim_400x400.jpg)
Image URLs work in production builds (if filenames with spaces are used, the code uses correctly URL-encoded paths such as %20)

file_operations.description: Add the uploaded 100gm pack front image as a static public asset served by the frontend.
Add the uploaded 200gm pack front image as a static public asset served by the frontend.

Replace the two product image paths to reference the new static assets (use URL-encoded paths for spaces, e.g., /assets/100gm%20Front.jpg and /assets/200gm%20Front.jpg), ensuring the old generated placeholder paths are no longer used.

requirements.summary: Remove physical address and map link from Contact section and Footer while keeping email and phone/WhatsApp.
acceptanceCriteria: The Contact section no longer displays an “Address” card and no longer includes any map link
The Footer no longer displays the physical address lines (e.g., “Sodala Jaipur / Rajasthan, 302001”)
Email remains displayed as info@tinyroot.co.in and phone/WhatsApp remains displayed as 9462112267 (as currently formatted in the UI)
No other visible UI text contains the removed physical address

file_operations.description: Remove the Address contact card (and any map link behavior) from the Contact section while keeping Email, Phone, and WhatsApp cards; also remove any unused address-related imports/logic after the change.
Remove the physical address lines from the footer contact area while keeping the email and phone items unchanged.
